category_sources: source_facts.description says it tunnels/sniffs between serial ports; official homepage describes serial/TCP sniffing.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official homepage title is sersniff.
docs_sources: Official Project Purple sersniff page is the primary documentation and download surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage only links a source tarball, not a source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage describes serial-port tunneling/sniffing and TCP support.
